Slith leveraged the scarcity principle in multiple ways. First, they highlight when something is currently rare or becoming less available. Second, they let others know of the unique features, limited access, limited timeframes, limited supply, and other scarcity-related factors that motivate people to move without delay. Sluths also know to collect and quickly share new information that supports their proposals, while describing to recipients how fresh and exclusive that information is. There are also four things that Sluths ask themselves. First, have I shown the unique or uncommon differentiators between my offer and my competitions? Second, have I let prospects know the benefits and advantages they stand to lose by failing to accept my proposal? Third, have I honestly informed my clients of any true, limited availability related to my offer? And lastly, have I sought out new or exclusive information favoring my proposal and informed my prospects of the scarcity of that information?
